# agentops_reviewers (Data Source)

The reviewer agents available to this account, including built-in reviewers, for use in `agentops_review_workflow.reviewer_agent_ids`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "agentops_reviewers" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `reviewers` (Attributes List) Available reviewer agents. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--reviewers))

<a id="nestedatt--reviewers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `reviewers`

Read-Only:

- `agent_id` (String) Reviewer agent identifier.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `findings_30d` (Number) Findings raised in the last 30 days.
- `is_builtin` (Boolean) Whether this is a built-in reviewer.
- `last_review_at` (String) Timestamp of the most recent review.
- `name` (String) Display name.
- `reviews_30d` (Number) Reviews performed in the last 30 days.
- `workflow_count` (Number) Number of workflows using this reviewer.
